creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, sorry about the missed response to the MFH. This falls under the blanket in the handbook, so it can be merged without approval.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/ports.html#ports-qa-blanket


I'll get the MFH in so this doesn't wait any longer as it has already been far too long since the original commit.
